Correlation Maps for Subset of Conditions

Source: R/pls_covariance.R
pls_corr_maps_notall.Rd

Computes correlation maps for a subset of conditions (used in multiblock PLS).

Usage

pls_corr_maps_notall(behavdata, datamat, n_subj, bscan, cormode = 0L)

Arguments

behavdata

Behavior matrix

datamat

Brain data matrix

n_subj

Number of subjects

bscan

Vector of condition indices to use

cormode

Correlation mode

Value

Correlation matrix for selected conditions
